attributes.description: Alerts when `backends / connection.max > 80%`. Near-exhaustion blocks new clients.
attributes.name: [PostgreSQL OTel] Connection utilization high

investigation_guide.blob:
## PostgreSQL connection utilization high

### What fired
`total backends / connection.max > 80%`.

### Why it matters
Exhausting `max_connections` prevents new clients from connecting — application outage. Usually indicates a pool misconfiguration.

### Triage
1. Inspect app-side pools.
2. Look for long-idle backends.

### Remediation
- Fix pooling / add pgbouncer.
- Raise `max_connections` only with memory headroom.

### Tuning
- 80% threshold.
